mapper.select: SELECT * FROM mini_program_release WHERE show_on_launch = 1 ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM mini_program_release ORDER BY published_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM mini_program_release WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mini_program_release (id, version_code, title, summary, body_html, published_at, show_on_launch, created_by) VALUES (#{id}, #{versionCode}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{bodyHtml}, #{publishedAt}, IFNULL(#{showOnLaunch}, 0), #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE mini_program_release SET version_code = #{versionCode}, title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, body_html = #{bodyHtml}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, show_on_launch = IFNULL(#{showOnLaunch}, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE mini_program_release SET show_on_launch = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
